questions.text: Who are 'An-Nazi'at' mentioned in the first verse?
questions.answer: The angels who extract the souls of the disbelievers violently.

questions.text: Who are 'An-Nashitat' mentioned in Verse 2?
questions.answer: The angels who draw out the souls of the believers gently.

questions.text: What will happen during the 'first blast' (ar-Rajifah) and the 'subsequent one' (ar-Radifah)?
questions.answer: The first signals death/destruction, and the second signals the resurrection.

questions.text: What will be the state of hearts on that Day?
questions.answer: Throbbing/palpitating with terror.

questions.text: What is the disbelievers' mocking question about bones?
questions.answer: 'Even after we are decayed bones, [will we be resurrected]?'.

questions.text: How many 'shouts' will it take for everyone to be on the surface of the earth?
questions.answer: A single shout (Zajrah).

questions.text: Where did Allah call Musa (AS) in the story mentioned?
questions.answer: In the sacred valley of Tuwa.

questions.text: What was the mission given to Musa (AS) regarding Pharaoh?
questions.answer: To go to Pharaoh, for he had transgressed, and ask if he would purify himself.

questions.text: What was 'the great sign' Musa showed Pharaoh?
questions.answer: His staff turning into a serpent (or his white hand).

questions.text: What was Pharaoh's ultimate claim of arrogance?
questions.answer: He said: 'I am your most exalted lord'.

questions.text: How did Allah punish Pharaoh?
questions.answer: He seized him with an exemplary punishment for the last and the first [transgression].

questions.text: What is a sign of Allah's power in the construction of the sky?
questions.answer: He raised its ceiling and proportioned it, darkened its night, and brought out its bright morning.

questions.text: What did Allah do with the earth after the heaven (Verse 30)?
questions.answer: He spread it out, brought forth its water and pasture, and made the mountains firm.

questions.text: What is 'At-Tammat al-Kubra'?
questions.answer: The Greatest Overwhelming Calamity (a name for the Day of Judgment).

questions.text: What will man remember on that Day?
questions.answer: Whatever he strove for in the world.

questions.text: Where will be the refuge for the one who transgressed and preferred the life of the world?
questions.answer: Hellfire.

questions.text: Where will be the refuge for the one who feared the standing before his Lord and restrained his soul from desire?
questions.answer: Paradise.

questions.text: Do people ask the Prophet about the 'Hour'?
questions.answer: Yes, but its knowledge is only with Allah.

questions.text: What is the Prophet's role regarding the Hour?
questions.answer: He is only a warner for those who fear it.

questions.text: How long will the world seem to people when they see the Day of Judgment?
questions.answer: Like an afternoon or a morning.
